pageTitle: Computer Science and Information Technology Notes
description: Comprehensive handwritten and digital notes covering the complete GATE Computer Science (CS) syllabus with theory, algorithms, solved examples, practice questions, and previous year questions.

resources.title: Engineering Mathematics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Discrete Mathematics, Linear Algebra, Calculus, Probability, Graph Theory, Combinatorics and Numerical Methods with GATE PYQs.

resources.title: Data Structures
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Binary Search Trees, Heaps, Hash Tables, Graphs and Trie data structures.

resources.title: Algorithms
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Sorting, Searching, Divide and Conquer, Greedy Algorithms, Dynamic Programming, Graph Algorithms, NP-Completeness and Complexity Analysis.

resources.title: Operating Systems
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Processes, Threads, CPU Scheduling, Synchronization, Deadlocks, Memory Management, Virtual Memory, File Systems and I/O Management.

resources.title: Database Management Systems
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: ER Model, Relational Algebra, SQL, Functional Dependencies, Normalization, Transactions, Concurrency Control and Recovery.

resources.title: Computer Networks
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: OSI and TCP/IP Models, Routing, Switching, Transport Layer, Congestion Control, Network Security and Wireless Networks.

resources.title: Computer Organization
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Digital Logic, Processor Architecture, Instruction Set Architecture, Memory Hierarchy, Pipelining, Cache Memory and I/O Organization.

resources.title: Theory of Computation
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Finite Automata, Regular Expressions, Context-Free Grammars, Pushdown Automata, Turing Machines, Decidability and Computability.

resources.title: Compiler Design
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Lexical Analysis, Parsing, Syntax-Directed Translation, Intermediate Code Generation, Code Optimization and Runtime Environments.

resources.title: Digital Logic
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Boolean Algebra, Logic Gates, Combinational Circuits, Sequential Circuits, Flip-Flops, Counters, Registers and Finite State Machines.
